title: astragalus circumdatus
intro: Astragalus circumdatus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and Mongolia, where it has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus circumdatus include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Astragalus circumdatus is often combined with other herbs and is available in various forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures.
